name: DAWSON GEOPHYSICAL CO
summary: Dawson Geophysical Company is a leading North American onshore seismic data acquisition services provider, operating in the continental U.S. and Canada. The company acquires and processes 2-D, 3-D, and multi-component seismic data for major oil and gas companies, independent operators, multi-client data library providers, and carbon capture sequestration projects. Services include conventional seismic surveys, multi-component surveys, surface recorded microseismic services, and heliportable capabilities through its Canadian subsidiary Eagle Canada Seismic Services ULC.

products.name: 3-D Seismic Data Acquisition
products.description: Acquisition of 3-D seismic surveys using vibration equipment or dynamite, deploying tens of thousands of recording channels for subsurface imaging.

products.name: 2-D Seismic Data Acquisition
products.description: Linear collection of seismic data generating a single plane of subsurface seismic data.

products.name: Multi-Component Seismic Surveys
products.description: Recording of shear waves using 3-C converted waves or horizontal vibrator energy source units for subsurface rock and reservoir characterization.

products.name: Surface Recorded Microseismic Services
products.description: Monitoring hydraulic fracturing operations for clients using company-owned equipment.

products.name: Heliportable Seismic Services
products.description: Specialized heliportable seismic acquisition capabilities offered through Eagle Canada, also serving the potash mining industry.

products.name: Single Point Node Channels
products.description: New single point node channel equipment acquired from GTC, Inc. for approximately $24.2 million to enhance seismic acquisition capabilities.

partnerships.partner_name: GTC, Inc. (subsidiary of Geospace Technologies Corporation)
partnerships.description: Dawson Operating agreed to acquire new single point node channels from GTC for ~$24.2 million under an Equipment Purchase Agreement, financed partly via Geospace Notes at 8.75% interest.
